app.title: Show HN: Sfsym – Export Apple SF Symbols as Vector SVG/PDF/PNG
app.author: olliewagner
app.description: Export SF Symbols in various formats
proposed_tests: Clone repo and run `go build`, then test `sfsym -h` and output formats
Export Symbols and verify output format
Compare SF Symbols vs built-in toolset
